preReview.title: Real Salt Lake vs San Jose Earthquakes: 'Es un partido que debemos ganar', dice Judd
preReview.description: Los San Jose Earthquakes viajan a Real Salt Lake en un enorme enfrentamiento entre dos aspirantes a playoffs en la Conferencia Oeste.

preReview.title: Real Salt Lake v San Jose Earthquakes: 'Questa è una partita da vincere', dice Judd
preReview.description: I San Jose Earthquakes viaggiano verso il Real Salt Lake in uno scontro importante tra due speranze di playoff nella Western Conference.

preReview.title: Real Salt Lake x San Jose Earthquakes: 'Isso é um jogo de vida ou morte', diz Judd
preReview.description: O San Jose Earthquakes viaja para enfrentar o Real Salt Lake em um grande confronto entre dois aspirantes aos playoffs na Conferência Oeste.

preReview.title: Real Salt Lake v San Jose Earthquakes: 'This is a must-win', says Judd
preReview.description: The San Jose Earthquakes travel to Real Salt Lake in a huge clash between two playoff hopefuls in the Western Conference.

preReview.title: Real Salt Lake v San Jose Earthquakes : 'C'est un match à gagner impérativement', déclare Judd
preReview.description: Les San Jose Earthquakes se rendent au Real Salt Lake pour un affrontement important entre deux prétendants aux playoffs de la Conférence Ouest.

preReview.title: Real Salt Lake gegen San Jose Earthquakes: 'Das ist ein Muss-Sieg', sagt Judd
preReview.description: Die San Jose Earthquakes reisen zu Real Salt Lake in einem großen Duell zwischen zwei Playoff-Anwärtern in der Western Conference.

preReview.title: ريال سولت ليك ضد سان خوسيه إيرثكويكس: 'يجب علينا الفوز'، يقول جود
preReview.description: يسافر فريق سان خوسيه إيرثكويكس لمواجهة ريال سولت ليك في مواجهة كبيرة بين فريقين يأملان في التأهل للتصفيات في المؤتمر الغربي.

preReview.title: Real Salt Lake x San Jose Earthquakes: 'Este é um jogo de vida ou morte', diz Judd
preReview.description: O San Jose Earthquakes viaja para o Real Salt Lake em um grande confronto entre duas equipes com esperança de playoffs na Conferência Oeste.

QAData.question: Who won between Real Salt Lake and San Jose Earthquakes on Sun, 27 Jul 2025 01:30:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: Real Salt Lake won 2–1 over San Jose Earthquakes on Sun, 27 Jul 2025 01:30:00 GMT.
